title: cyrtomium remotisporum
intro: Cyrtomium remotisporum, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Cyrtomium remotisporum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, act as an anti-inflammatory, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Cyrtomium remotisporum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
